subcodes.first_line: O beautiful branch of the blessed Lote-Tree! Today the station of souls that are associated with the divine Tree is this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجمیل من السدره المبارکه الیوم شان نفوس منتسبه بشجره الهیه اینست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
